title: Unarmed Fighting

markdown:
# Unarmed Fighting

When you hit with your [[unarmed_strike Strike]] and deal damage, you can deal Bludgeoning damage equal to 1d6 plus your Strength modifier instead of the normal damage of an [[unarmed_strike Strike]]. If you aren't holding any weapons or a [[shield]] when you make the attack roll, the d6 becomes a d8.

At the start of each of your turns, you can deal 1d4 Bludgeoning damage to one creature [[grappled]] by you.
